description: Colorful Peppa Pig cruise ship playset includes three character figures and various beach-themed accessories. Plastic ship has multiple levels, bunk beds, and a fold-out side panel revealing a ball pit scene. Set comes with a slide, lounge chairs, a table, and a pool.

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Worth a trip if seller confirms completeness and condition first
must_include_reason_themes: description matches visible items in photo
photo quality high enough to assess what's included
photo looks like a real seller photo not a stock image
description is specific not fluffy
should_ask_seller: original retail price / brand / model
when purchased
any issues to flag before I drive
still available
is this the complete set
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
absolute commands like avoid at all costs

notes.photo_signal: Real home setting (not Amazon stock). Good quality. Items match description. Used-like-new condition appears plausible.
notes.why_this_grade: Text and photo align with specific product details; real home photo; description is specific enough to justify a trip with standard confirmation questions.

notes.photo_signal: Genuine-looking Peppa Pig playset photo, multiple items visible, but sparse text.
notes.why_this_grade: Photo looks real but text is too sparse for Good; missing price, brand clarity, and completeness per v1 rules — default to Not sure.
notes.pm_note: User might still drive if close by — product should not treat proximity as a signal in v1 (not in inputs). Grade stays Not sure; user applies their own context.

description: Condition: Used - Good. Age Range: All ages. Its available don't ask or will be ignored and make your offer amount $ and time you want to pick up. Best offer gets it. No food or box toys included. No trays that were inside are gone!! Really cute toy. Please refer to actual item photo for reference. Sizing is about a foot tall, not life size don't ask if human size it's not!! Dimensions: Measures approximately 18" (H) x 13.5" (W) x 6.5" (D).

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Skip this trip — too many missing accessories and best-offer pricing makes it not worth your time
must_include_reason_themes: many accessories missing compared to retail or promo photo not just a few
incomplete set makes the toy much less usable or fun
best offer with no listed price is too much hassle for a used toy
age range listed as all ages is not accurate for this product
actual seller photos show empty compartments and missing trays
should_ask_seller: what is your price for this
any damage or missing parts beyond the trays
is there anything else you can sell along with this
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good despite missing parts and incomplete set

notes.photo_signal: Photos 1–2 are real home shots of a pink Minnie Mouse toy kitchen with doors open; many interior trays and accessories missing. Photo 3 looks like a retail or Amazon-style image with full accessories and toy food, unlike what is actually for sale.
notes.why_this_grade: Comparing the promo or retail image to the actual listing photos shows far too many missing accessories — not just a tray or two, enough to make the toy much less fun. Best-offer-only with no price adds hassle; easier to find another toy. Avoid the trip.
notes.pm_note: Seller language is slightly rude but also no-BS; neutral on tone. Dimension details in multiple forms are helpful. Promote to UI demo after eval pass — see build notes backlog.

description: Condition: Used - Good. Character: Animal. Interactive toy farm playset has a red barn with working lights. It comes with several animal figures including a chicken, a pink mouse, a sheep, a purple horse, a green cow, and a pink rabbit.

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Promising listing but ask about price, completeness, usage, and whether interactive features work before you drive
must_include_reason_themes: text and photos match with specific animal and color details
real home photos from multiple angles not stock images
condition described as used good but limited usage history
no listed price or original retail context for trip worthiness
cannot verify interactive features or lights working from photos alone
should_ask_seller: how long has this been used
are there any components that are missing
what is the interactive part and is everything working as expected
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good without price completeness and working features confirmed

notes.photo_signal: Three real home photos of a red interactive farm barn with silo; animals visible across angles match listed colors and types. Lights not shown on in photos; completeness of all pieces unclear across shots.
notes.why_this_grade: Leaning good — strong text-photo match and thoughtful listing effort — but not enough to drive yet: no price, unknown usage length, missing components unconfirmed, and interactive or light features not demonstrated in photos.
notes.pm_note: Do not grade on fun or value for money without price. Specific color details may be LLM-assisted seller text; still a positive listing-quality signal.

description: Condition: Used - like new. Think we have all pieces - basically brand new, kids never quite took to it.

text and photos align on the same robud workbench product

enough product context to decide trip worthiness despite brief seller text

notes.photo_signal: Photo 1: real home shot of Robud wooden workbench beside bookshelves; looks like-new. Photo 2: Amazon product page screenshot showing $66.99 list price, 4.6 stars, and full product title.
notes.why_this_grade: Text-photo match is strong; seller smartly pairs a believable real photo with the original Amazon listing for price and specs. Brief text is offset by retail screenshot — straightforward lister, condition matches visuals. Trip-worthy with standard confirmation questions.
notes.pm_note: Brief seller text plus retail screenshot is a positive pattern — distinct from sparse listing with no price or product context.

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Skip this trip — visible structural damage at the base makes it not worth driving for
must_include_reason_themes: visible crack or break in the plastic base or bottom of the cart
fair condition and clean text does not match the damage shown in the photo
structural damage likely affects stability and usability for a child
not worth a trip even if the listing sounds acceptable at first glance
single photo shows enough to spot a serious condition problem
should_ask_seller: what is your address for pickup
would you consider giving this away for free given the damage
is pickup only or would you drop off if it is free
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good or Not sure despite visible structural damage
treating fair condition text as reliable without checking the photo

notes.photo_signal: Real home photo of a pink and purple toy shopping cart on carpet. Teal plastic base has a large white stress mark and vertical crack between the wheels — looks snapped or structurally compromised.
notes.why_this_grade: Seller says fair and clean, but the photo shows obvious bottom/base damage that would make the cart unstable. Not worth a trip; at most ask for address or whether they'd give it away free.
notes.pm_note: Low-effort text plus visible damage is an Avoid pattern — photo contradicts the condition claim.
